entity.summary: BitShares-based decentralized exchange that announced closure in December 2019, citing market conditions and increasing regulation pressure.
entity.notes: HEI records BitShares ecosystem as CryptoBridge's technical origin because the project launched as a gateway providing access to the BitShares decentralized trading platform. No reliable legal-country assignment was established. The shutdown notice set deposit closure for 2019-12-03 and termination of services and servers after 2019-12-15.

expected.notes: Shutdown notice said deposits would close on 2019-12-03 and all services and servers would terminate after 2019-12-15.

changes.notes: HEI records BitShares ecosystem as CryptoBridge's technical origin because the project launched as a gateway providing access to the BitShares decentralized trading platform. No reliable legal-country assignment was established. The shutdown notice set deposit closure for 2019-12-03 and termination of services and servers after 2019-12-15.

evidence.title: CryptoBridge ANN — Gateway to BitShares
evidence.notes: The project's launch announcement describes CryptoBridge as a gateway providing access to the BitShares blockchain and decentralized trading platform.
